case_title: CURIO INC. VS. MODERN CITIZEN INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-03-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CURIO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MODERN CITIZEN INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN CITIZEN INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CURIO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN CITIZEN INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED NOV-18-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN CITIZEN INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF CURIO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAVID CHEN--PRESIDENT AND OWNER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JESSICA C. LEE--CEO. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
